title: hieracium picroides subsp. picroides
intro: Hieracium picroides subsp. picroides is a subspecies of the Hieracium picroides plant, commonly known as the hawkweed or Chinese hawkbit, which belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium picroides subsp. picroides include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism and arthritis, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
